creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text: Just to update to my current status, since my update to head on Jan 13 I have not had a single incident of "Invalid TXQ id". Possibly related, drm-61-kmod no longer fails to load firmware on my Alder Lake laptop and iwlwifi had been running almost flawlessly, except for an odd outage of a few seconds on two occasions when the interface lost its association with the AP.
